title: Bak kut teh
description: a popular, fragrant pork rib dish simmered for hours in a complex broth of herbs, spices, and garlic, originating from Klang, Malaysia.

title: Otak-otak
description: a popular Southeast Asian grilled or steamed fish cake, originating from Indonesia, made by mixing minced fish (usually mackerel) with coconut milk, egg, starch, and a spicy aromatic paste.

title: traditional Steamed fish
description: Traditional steamed fish, particularly the Cantonese style, is a delicate dish featuring a whole fish steamed with ginger and scallions, then drizzled with hot oil and soy sauce
